title: Proportion Calculator: Solve a / b = c / x
shortDescription: Solve the proportion a / b = c / x and find x by cross-multiplication.
description: A free proportion calculator that solves a / b = c / x using cross-multiplication. Enter a, b and c to instantly find the value of x for ratios, scaling and everyday math.
metaDescription: Free proportion calculator. Enter a, b and c to solve a / b = c / x by cross-multiplication and find x instantly. Perfect for ratios, scaling and math homework.

result.label: x
result.empty: Enter a, b and c to find x.

sections.heading: What is a proportion?
paragraphs: A proportion states that two ratios are equal, written as a / b = c / x. When one value is unknown, you can solve for it using cross-multiplication.
This calculator finds the missing term x with the formula x = (b × c) / a, so you get an accurate answer without doing the arithmetic by hand.

sections.heading: When to use it
paragraphs: Proportions appear in recipes, map scales, currency conversions, unit pricing and many science problems where quantities grow at the same rate.
Use this tool any time you know three parts of a proportion and need to find the fourth.

howTo.name: Enter a and b
howTo.text: Type the first ratio's values into the a and b fields.

howTo.name: Enter c
howTo.text: Type the known value of the second ratio into the c field.

howTo.name: Read x
howTo.text: The calculator solves a / b = c / x and shows the value of x.

faq.a: Yes, you can enter decimal values for a, b and c.
If a is zero the proportion has no solution, because dividing by zero is undefined.

faq.q: Does it work with negative numbers?
faq.a: Yes, negative values are accepted and handled correctly.
Yes, it is completely free and works directly in your browser.
